subcodes.first_line: O thou kind maidservant of God! Truly, I say, thou art worthy of the service in the Kingdom and art meriting to be a maidservant
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز مهربان الهی فی الحقیقه سزاوار خدمت ملکوتی و لایق کنیزی بارگاه رب
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @growth of the Cause, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @firmness in the Covenant
